Event: Magic Training - Batsquirrel
Event Date: 23/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI172
Batsquirrel Trainer Ring

For the duration of the battle, the unit's attacks have a 50% chance to set fire to the target. The burning enemy takes 201600 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 35% for 3,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
